Ausweather

5-DAY SEVERE WEATHER OUTLOOK

Hour-by-hour severe weather risk for Australia — wind, hail, flood and tornado — derived from the NOAA GFS global forecast model, overlaid on live precipitation radar.

Use the timeline to step through individual forecast hours. Pan and zoom the map (or tap the ◎ button) to focus on your local area. Toggle live radar and layers with the ☷ button.

Risk levels are computed heuristically from model fields and are not official warnings. For authoritative forecasts and warnings visit bom.gov.au.

Data: NOAA GFS 2026-06-17 06Z · generated 2026-06-17 10:38 UTC · radar © RainViewer · map © CARTO/OpenStreetMap
